findings.line: What remained was the pair who had heard the turn in the blade and lived.
findings.whatItRestates: The preceding line already narrows the moment with 'The camp fell away.'; this sentence translates that contraction into summary.

findings.line: On the way back the wind only ground at lashes and whitened the dragon bones until sky and earth seemed cut from the same pale ruin.
findings.deletionTest: On the way back the wind only ground at lashes and whitened the dragon bones until sky and earth were cut from the same pale ruin.
findings.suggestedFix: On the way back the wind only ground at lashes and whitened the dragon bones until sky and earth were one pale ruin.

findings.couldEndEarlierAt: Keeping silent left bitterness in her mouth.

findings.povMismatch: The fragment captions Antonidas from outside Sylvanas instead of staying with a physical read she can make.

findings.line: The sort of corridor never built for princes.
findings.povMismatch: The sentence zooms out into category talk about what corridors are for instead of staying in Sylvanas's immediate service-passage read.

findings.line: There is a turn in it.
findings.missingPayload: The sentence never names the actual opening point between Frostmourne's taking and throwing phases.
findings.reason: P3 placeholder phrasing leaves Antonidas to infer the usable mechanism.
findings.suggestedFix: It opens for an instant between taking and throwing.

findings.line: Sylvanas sat beside her through most of the second night, close enough for the thing to be said aloud and tested.
findings.missingPayload: The stand-in noun 'thing' hides that the line means Jaina's three-school sequence.
findings.reason: P3 placeholder noun substitutes for the actual plan being tested.
findings.suggestedFix: Sylvanas sat beside her through most of the second night, close enough for Jaina to say the sequence aloud and test it.

findings.line: Catch the breath with frost. Drive through it with arcane force. Then fire, before it closed its hand again.
findings.setup: Jaina sat on a coil of rope with her back to the mast and forced the answer into plainer words until she could say it aloud.
findings.missingPayload: The simplified version still withholds the usable opening, leaving the listener without a plain trigger or target.
findings.reason: The exchange claims to go plainer but still relies on metaphorical shorthand that needs another unpacking pass.
findings.suggestedFix: Freeze the turn with frost. Arcane through the gap. Then fire before it closes.

summary.verdictReason: Pass B still carries 9 mild findings across four guides. Manifest trajectory for pass B is oscillating (14, 12, 14), so fixes were kept conservative, but the run still exceeds the 3-mild pass threshold.
